newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The Q1 revenue/operating-income miss and the May 21 Valco Melton acquisition ($447M cash, ~14x EBITDA, closing Q3) both predate the window and were in the prior case. Nothing new since.

verdicts.rankRationale: Strict latent-node lens: precision fluid-handling could touch coolant/thermal-fluid handling, but the thesis is unchanged. Q1 miss and Valco Melton deal predate June 9 and were in the prior case; -0.8% is drift. No new info. Hold.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Precision fluid metering/dispensing optionality for data-center coolant and thermal-fluid handling.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Soft industrial demand (Q1 revenue/operating-income miss) and only indirect AI exposure.
verdicts.bull: Best-in-class fluid-handling franchise plus Valco Melton adds adhesives/inspection adjacency.
verdicts.neutral: High-quality industrial compounder but AI-coolant linkage remains speculative and unproven in numbers.
verdicts.bear: Cyclical industrial softness, a recent guidance miss, and no direct AI revenue line yet.
